name: msp-it-services-core
description: First MSP / managed IT services query set — SMB buyer questions with a Montreal/Quebec regional flavor. Seeded for the mipsmedia.com pilot.

queries.queryText: Which managed IT service providers in Montreal are recommended for small and mid-sized businesses?
What should a business look for when choosing a managed IT services provider?
Who offers 24/7 IT support and proactive monitoring for businesses in the Montreal area?
Which IT companies help small businesses with cybersecurity and ransomware protection in Quebec?
Which IT providers can plan and manage a move to the cloud for a small business?
Who provides backup, disaster recovery and business continuity services for SMBs in Montreal?
Is it better for a 20-50 person company to outsource IT to a managed services provider or hire in-house?
Which IT support companies serve businesses in both French and English in Quebec?
Who can do an IT assessment or security audit for a small business before switching providers?
How do I switch from a bad IT provider without disrupting my business, and who handles that transition well?
